items.prompt: Arrange into a natural Hungarian sentence (neutral order):
items.explanation: Negation nem stands immediately before the verb: én nem eszek húst.

items.prompt: Arrange into a natural Hungarian sentence:
items.explanation: Time adverb ma often comes early; subject Péter, then verb olvas with object egy könyvet.

items.prompt: Arrange into a natural Hungarian sentence (focus on 'te'):
items.promptEnglish: YOU are going to the cinema (not someone else).
items.explanation: Focus on te: te mesz a moziba — pronoun before verb when emphasized.

items.prompt: Arrange into a natural Hungarian sentence:
items.explanation: Definite conjugation látom with definite object a kutyát; verb can lead in neutral contexts.
